Study plan

EACVI + ASCeXAM

Build your day-by-day plan

Builds a dated schedule from today to your exam. Each day gets a focus topic, checkable study tasks, and the matching guideline, textbook chapter, and video to work through — with extra, earlier sessions on the domains you're currently weakest in.

Topic of the day

✓ From the companion
A focused daily brief drawn straight from your Clinical Echocardiography Study Companion — exact cutoffs, the algorithm with each branch, pearls and pitfalls.

Ask an expert

⚡ Consultant-level AI

MCQ practice

✓ Verified bank

New question set

Questions are drawn from 2,100+ clinician-checked, guideline-anchored board items (including 988 figure-based questions), scoped by domain. Use Question type to drill image questions only. Options are reshuffled each set so the answer never sits in a predictable position.

Or review your saved bank →

Today's focus

High-yield

Teaching library

Hand-picked topics across every domain, each opening a focused teaching video from a trusted channel. Tick them off as you watch — your progress is tracked per domain.

Reading library

On-device

Open your own PDF textbooks and read them here, page by page. The first time you open a book it's saved into this app's on-device storage, so afterwards you reopen it with a single tap — no re-selecting. Nothing is uploaded; books stay on this device and per-device.

Trusted echo channels

Verified sources

Hand-picked, real channels used by cardiology fellows worldwide — society channels, leading courses, case libraries, and Mayo Clinic teaching.

Latest guidelines by topic

✓ Verified

The current ASE / EACVI / ESC document for each echo topic — the source of truth behind the cutoffs you're learning. Each opens the society's official page; the search link is a fail-safe that always resolves to the document. Verify cutoffs here before relying on them.

Settings

Exam targets

AI backend

Claude → Gemini

The app uses Claude for all clinical content — it is held to a verified set of ASE/EACVI reference values on every call. Gemini is the fast, free-tier alternative (it has a large context window, useful for generating question sets). Keys are saved in this browser only — never in the GitHub repo. Each colleague enters their own key on their own device.

⚠︎ Never paste your key into index.html or commit it — GitHub's secret scanner will detect it and the provider will auto-revoke the key. If your key stopped working, that is almost certainly why: generate a fresh one in the provider's console (Google AI Studio for Gemini) and enter it here.

Sync

Firebase project echo-prep · collections namespaced echoprep_*.

Use the same email/password you registered with on the other EchoPrep app — your sync data is kept separate (in echoprep_users).

About

EchoPrep Studio — single-file PWA · repo Ahmedshafie85/Echo-preparation. Day-by-day study plan, AI MCQs with references, expert Q&A, and video library.
